notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Gage Workman.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Gage Workman.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Zach McKinstry out at 2nd. Spencer Torkelson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Nolan McLean picks off Wenceel Pérez at 1st on throw to first baseman Mark Vientos.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Gage Workman.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, third baseman Colt Keith to second baseman Gage Workman to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Carson Benge steals (8) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor pops out to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor grounds out softly, pitcher Brenan Hanifee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
